summary: Iteration 4 Audio->MIDI conversion verified end-to-end. Uploaded /tmp/test_piano_scale.wav, Basic Pitch produced exactly 8 notes [60,62,64,65,67,69,71,72] = perfect C major scale, all constraints pass, song persisted via POST/GET /api/songs, playback highlights 7 distinct piano keys.
passed: GET /api/songs returns list; new song persisted (count 5 -> 6)
All midi in [21,108] integer piano range (values 60-72)
MIDI sequence exactly matches C major scale ground truth
conversion-progress UI element appeared during upload
Play button triggers playback; 7 distinct piano keys highlighted (>= 3 required)
Demo song (Twinkle) still selectable and displayed as Now Playing (regression OK)

failed.issue: Test polling only captured 'Detecting pitches' stage; 'Decoding audio' and 'Building MIDI' stages were not observed (likely too fast to catch at 1s polling). The UI element does appear and progress advances, but three-stage sequence not explicitly verified.
failed.evidence: stages_seen={'detecting'} in browser automation output; conversion-progress element became visible with text 'Detecting pitches 0%'.

action_items: Optional: verify all three progress-stage labels ('Decoding audio', 'Detecting pitches', 'Building MIDI') render by inspecting SongLibrary.jsx (not a blocker — conversion works).
